objective: PR A for issue #280 locks planning/preflight, public-source persona/audience/depth research, UI/behavior/conversion/quality matrix coverage, and a merge-safe red-evidence framework only. It explicitly does not implement runtime product behavior. Non-goals and hard boundaries: no provider setup, paid spend, hosted or public demo, public URL, production-readiness claim, cloned identity runtime, real media, private strategy, invite codes, provider strategy, provider payloads or outputs, secrets, credentials, tokens, raw private uploads, real personal data, or sensitive roadmap wording. #249 and #280 remain open; C3B remains blocked until #280 is satisfied or reviewed/re-scoped. Required skills invoked: planning, spec, TDD, source-driven, security, API/interface, observability, code review, doubt review, taste, git workflow, and public-safe persona research. Rejected options: runtime/backend/frontend/RAG/provider/avatar implementation, provider setup, paid or hosted evidence, issue-comment-only evidence, permanent failing tests, and closing-keyword automation. Expected validation: guardrail/unit/phase1/checkpoint3 gates, make quality, ci/security/dependency/secrets, ruff, mypy, and forced PR guardrails. Red evidence is stored as public-safe reviewed artifacts, xfail/skip only with removal criteria, and matrix states such as RED_EVIDENCE_CAPTURED or PLANNED_IMPLEMENTATION. Completion criteria: every PR A row has status, evidence type, planned executable command or reviewed re-scope, owner PR slice, and remaining #280 rows are stated.
